name: Amish Sour Cream Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
Beat sour cream and egg together; add sugar, flour, salt, and vanilla. Mix until smooth. Stir in apples. Place the mixture into the pie shell and bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes.
Meanwhile, mix the topping ingredients until crumbly. Remove the pie from the oven and sprinkle the crumb topping over it. Bake for an additional 20 minutes.
